gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the engine-probe ownership inversion and found two legacy import-order isolation issues: public document monkeypatches installed before legacy import could become legacy defaults for functions and metadata constants. The legacy wrapper now loads a private pristine copy of the document implementation for defaults, explicitly takes metadata constants from that private copy, preserves legacy monkeypatch overlays after import, and keeps accepting document-owned EngineKVProbeFactoryResult objects. GPT-5.5 re-review approved the branch.

issues.resolution: Loaded a private pristine copy of document_kv_cache.engine_probe for legacy defaults and added a subprocess regression that patches public _parse_metadata_items before importing the legacy wrapper.
issues.summary: Legacy callable defaults were import-order dependent when the public document module was monkeypatched before legacy import.

issues.resolution: Assigned legacy ENGINE_KV_PROBE_METADATA_* constants from the private pristine defaults module and added a subprocess regression for provenance metadata key stability.
issues.summary: Legacy provenance metadata constants could capture public document constant monkeypatches installed before legacy import.

scope: legacy module execution and helper monkeypatch migration hooks
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q

python -m py_compile src/document_kv_cache/engine_probe.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/engine_probe.py src/document_kv_cache/__init__.py tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
find src tests -name '*.py' -print0 | xargs -0 python -m py_compile
PYTHONPATH=src poetry run python -m document_kv_cache.pr_evidence --validate-directory pr-evidence
repository secret scan over README, package metadata, source, tests, Databricks helpers, PR evidence, and GitHub metadata
GPT-5.5 review and re-review after resolving legacy import-order isolation findings
what_changed: Moved the native engine KV connector probe runner into document_kv_cache.engine_probe.
Routed document_kv_cache root engine-probe symbols to the document-owned module.
Turned restaurant_kv_serving.engine_probe into a compatibility wrapper over the document module.
Preserved legacy module execution, public and private helper monkeypatch behavior, document factory-result compatibility, slotted config layout, and the previous legacy star-import surface.
Added pickle support for EngineKVProbeConfig despite immutable metadata mapping proxies.
why: The generalized package should own native vLLM/SGLang engine-probe evidence generation because it is part of the serving-engine integration boundary. Keeping legacy compatibility makes this an incremental, behavior-preserving step toward retiring restaurant-specific implementation ownership.
